question:
I'm new to this codebase and need a real code-based tour before my first behavior change.

Find the central runtime flow, trace it from the public API to the code that does the work, and show the nearby code paths and tests I should read next.

shellCommands: "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "class Blueprint|def register|def add_url_rule|def before_request|def after_request|def teardown_request|def record" src/flask/blueprints.py'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "class Blueprint|def register|def add_url_rule|def record|def before_request|def after_request|def teardown_request" src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "def test_request_dispatching|def test_url_mapping|def test_after_request_processing|def test_teardown_request_handler|def test_teardown_request_handler_error|def test_before_after_request_order|def test_error_handling|def test_error_handling_processing|def test_before_request_and_routing_errors|def test_user_error_handling|def test_http_error_subclass_handling|def test_errorhandler_precedence" tests/test_basic.py'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "def test_basic_view|def test_method_based_view|def test_view_decorators|def test_implicit_head|def test_endpoint_override|def test_methods_var_inheritance|def test_multiple_inheritance|def test_remove_method_from_parent|def test_init_once" tests/test_views.py'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "def test_teardown_on_pop|def test_context_binding|def test_manual_context_binding|def test_copy_context_thread|def test_session_error_pops_context|def test_session_dynamic_cookie_name" tests/test_reqctx.py'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "def test_request_processing|def test_app_request_processing|def test_app_url_processors|def test_nested_blueprint|def test_nested_callback_order|def test_nesting_url_prefixes|def test_nesting_subdomains|def test_unique_blueprint_names|def test_blueprint_renaming" tests/test_blueprints.py'

"C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe" -Command 'rg -n "def test_error_handler_no_match|def test_error_handler_subclass|def test_error_handler_http_subclass|def test_error_handler_blueprint|def test_default_error_handler|class TestGenericHandlers" tests/test_user_error_handler.py'
baseline.answer:
The central runtime flow is the WSGI request path: route registration builds `url_map` and `view_functions`, then `wsgi_app` pushes a request context, matches the URL, runs pre-request hooks, dispatches the view, turns the return value into a response, runs post-request hooks, and tears the context down.

**Runtime Spine**
- The public import surface starts in [src/flask/__init__.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/__init__.py), where `from flask import Flask` resolves to [Flask](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L109).
- The shared setup layer is [src/flask/sansio/app.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/app.py#L59) (`App`) plus [src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py#L52) (`route`, `get`, `post`, etc.). `route` is at [src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py:336](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py#L336), and it funnels into `add_url_rule` at [src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py:368](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/scaffold.py#L368).
- The actual rule materialization happens in [src/flask/sansio/app.py:605](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/app.py#L605), where Flask creates a Werkzeug `Rule`, adds it to `url_map`, and stores the callable in `view_functions`.
- Runtime entry is [src/flask/app.py:1618](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1618) `__call__`, which delegates to [src/flask/app.py:1566](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1566) `wsgi_app`.
- `wsgi_app` creates a request context with [src/flask/app.py:1501](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1501), then pushes and matches it in [src/flask/ctx.py:416](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/ctx.py#L416) and [src/flask/ctx.py:405](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/ctx.py#L405).
- The main work happens in [src/flask/app.py:992](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L992) `full_dispatch_request`, which calls [src/flask/app.py:1366](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1366) `preprocess_request`, [src/flask/app.py:966](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L966) `dispatch_request`, [src/flask/app.py:1224](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1224) `make_response`, and [src/flask/app.py:1394](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L1394) `process_response`; teardown runs when the context is popped in [src/flask/ctx.py:446](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/ctx.py#L446).
- Exceptions branch into [src/flask/app.py:865](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L865) `handle_user_exception` and [src/flask/app.py:897](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/app.py#L897) `handle_exception`.
- Class-based views enter through [src/flask/views.py:86](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/views.py#L86) `View.as_view` and dispatch in [src/flask/views.py:182](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/views.py#L182) `MethodView.dispatch_request`.
- Blueprints defer registration through [src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py:273](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py#L273), and their `BlueprintSetupState.add_url_rule` is at [src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py:87](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/sansio/blueprints.py#L87).

**Read Next**
- Route and method semantics: [tests/test_basic.py:129](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L129) and [tests/test_basic.py:157](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L157).
- Response finalization and teardown: [tests/test_basic.py:759](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L759), [tests/test_basic.py:774](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L774), and [tests/test_basic.py:848](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L848).
- Error behavior: [tests/test_basic.py:886](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L886), [tests/test_basic.py:924](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L924), [tests/test_basic.py:956](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L956), [tests/test_basic.py:970](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L970), [tests/test_basic.py:986](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L986), [tests/test_basic.py:1018](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_basic.py#L1018), plus [tests/test_user_error_handler.py:10](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_user_error_handler.py#L10), [tests/test_user_error_handler.py:61](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_user_error_handler.py#L61), [tests/test_user_error_handler.py:100](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_user_error_handler.py#L100), [tests/test_user_error_handler.py:136](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_user_error_handler.py#L136), and [tests/test_user_error_handler.py:163](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_user_error_handler.py#L163).
- Request/app context behavior: [tests/test_reqctx.py:15](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_reqctx.py#L15), [tests/test_reqctx.py:106](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_reqctx.py#L106), [tests/test_reqctx.py:134](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_reqctx.py#L134), [tests/test_reqctx.py:147](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_reqctx.py#L147), [tests/test_reqctx.py:177](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_reqctx.py#L177), and [tests/test_reqctx.py:201](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_reqctx.py#L201).
- Class-based views: [tests/test_views.py:18](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L18), [tests/test_views.py:29](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L29), [tests/test_views.py:81](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L81), [tests/test_views.py:153](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L153), [tests/test_views.py:183](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L183), [tests/test_views.py:201](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L201), [tests/test_views.py:219](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L219), [tests/test_views.py:238](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L238), and [tests/test_views.py:257](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_views.py#L257).
- Blueprints and nested callback order: [tests/test_blueprints.py:768](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L768), [tests/test_blueprints.py:799](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L799), [tests/test_blueprints.py:838](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L838), [tests/test_blueprints.py:865](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L865), [tests/test_blueprints.py:914](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L914), [tests/test_blueprints.py:1003](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L1003), [tests/test_blueprints.py:1025](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L1025), [tests/test_blueprints.py:1066](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L1066), and [tests/test_blueprints.py:1089](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/tests/test_blueprints.py#L1089).
- If you want the test harness itself, `app.test_client()` is in [src/flask/testing.py:109](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/testing.py#L109) and [src/flask/testing.py:204](C:/Users/samch/AppData/Local/Temp/samchon-graph-corpus/flask/src/flask/testing.py#L204).
